-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
This file is part of the List_Image project
available at https://github.com/LionelDraghi/List_Image
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note that two identical packages exist, named :
List_Image.[Unix|Windows]_Predefined_Styles
The only difference between those packages is this platform specific
EOL definition.

generic_instantiations.name: Bulleted_List_Style
generic_instantiations.code:
package Bulleted_List_Style is new Image_Style
  (Prefix           => EOL & "- ",
   Separator        => EOL & "- ",
   Postfix          => EOL,
   Prefix_If_Empty  => "",
   Postfix_If_Empty => "");

generic_instantiations.name: HTML_Bulleted_List_Style
generic_instantiations.code:
package HTML_Bulleted_List_Style is new Image_Style (Prefix => "
    " & EOL & "
  • ", Separator => "
    • " & EOL & "
  • ", Postfix => "
    • " & EOL & "
", Prefix_If_Empty => "", Postfix_If_Empty => "");

generic_instantiations.name: Markdown_Bulleted_List_Style
generic_instantiations.code:
package Markdown_Bulleted_List_Style is new Image_Style
  (Prefix           => EOL & EOL & "- ",
   Separator        => EOL & "- ",
   Postfix          => EOL & EOL,
   Prefix_If_Empty  => EOL,
   Postfix_If_Empty => "");
